chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-58 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 14.10.2025 Mr.Muhammad Iqbal Hingoro, Advocate for applicant Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G ********** Learned counsel for the applicant files statement dated 25.9.2025, which is taken on record and copy thereof supplied to the learned A.P.G. Heard arguments. For the reasons to be recorded, the instant Revision Application is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
